untranslatable_reason: Signal requires ranking stocks by monthly momentum and selecting top performers from CNX100 universe. This is a cross-sectional portfolio construction rule (relative ranking/selection across multiple securities) that cannot be expressed as a single-security technical condition using the provided indicators. The allowed indicators are designed for single-bar or single-security time-series analysis. Momentum ranking requires access to the full universe of CNX100 constituents and their comparative returns, which is beyond the scope of per-security rule conditions.
translation_notes: This is a fundamental portfolio strategy (momentum factor, monthly rebalancing) rather than a technical signal. It requires: (1) universe-level ranking by past returns, (2) portfolio construction logic (select top N), and (3) calendar-based rebalancing. These are position-sizing and universe-selection decisions, not entry/exit conditions on individual securities. A proper backtest would require custom portfolio logic, not single-security rule conditions.
